narrative:
Riverside Local Sd school district has 28,531 registered voters, with 53.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.8%, a clear Republican lean of 10.9 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -2.8% D−R vs -15.7% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
